name: create_quote
description: Create a quote for an international money transfer. You specify the source currency, target currency, and the amount you want to send or the amount you want the recipient to receive. The quote locks in the exchange rate and fees for a limited time.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Your Wise profile ID (personal or business). This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: sourceCurrency
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the source currency (the currency you are sending from).

parameters.name: targetCurrency
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the target currency (the currency the recipient will receive).

parameters.name: sourceAmount
parameters.description: The amount to send in the source currency. Provide either sourceAmount or targetAmount, not both.

parameters.name: targetAmount
parameters.description: The amount the recipient should receive in the target currency. Provide either sourceAmount or targetAmount, not both.

parameters.name: payOut
parameters.description: How the recipient gets their money. Common value is BANK_TRANSFER.
